panels.description: Total code review sessions with findings
panels.title: Review Sessions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT trace_id) AS total
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE name = 'tool_result'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.operation')) = 'code_review'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)

panels.description: Total code findings across all review sessions
panels.title: Total Findings

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.findings_count') AS UNSIGNED)) AS total
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE name = 'tool_result'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.operation')) = 'code_review'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)

panels.description: Major severity findings from code reviews
panels.title: Major Findings

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.severity_counts.major') AS UNSIGNED)), 0) AS total
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE name = 'tool_result'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.operation')) = 'code_review'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)

panels.description: Total LLM tokens consumed across all agent sessions
panels.title: Total Tokens

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(total_tokens) AS total
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE type = 'GENERATION'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)

panels.description: LLM models used by the agent
panels.title: LLM Model

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(model, 'unknown') AS model
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE type = 'GENERATION' AND model IS NOT NULL AND model != ''
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Agent escalation events (interrupts requiring human attention)
panels.title: Escalations

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.escalation_count') AS UNSIGNED)), 0) AS total
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE name = 'handoff_submitted'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)

panels.description: Each agent session with its code review results, tool calls, and LLM cost
panels.title: Agent Review Sessions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  t.timestamp,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ss.input, '$.user_id')) AS user,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ss.input, '$.message_preview')) AS request,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(tr.input, '$.findings_count') AS UNSIGNED) AS findings,
  COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(tr.input, '$.severity_counts.major') AS UNSIGNED), 0) AS major,
  COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(tr.input, '$.severity_counts.minor') AS UNSIGNED), 0) AS minor,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(hs.input, '$.tool_call_count') AS UNSIGNED) AS tool_calls,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(hs.input, '$.escalation_count') AS UNSIGNED) AS escalations,
  ROUND(t.latency_ms / 1000) AS duration_sec,
  (
    SELECT SUM(o.total_tokens)
    FROM _tool_langfuse_observations o
    WHERE o.trace_id = t.trace_id AND o.type = 'GENERATION'
  ) AS tokens,
  t.session_id
FROM _tool_langfuse_traces t
LEFT JOIN _tool_langfuse_observations ss
  ON ss.trace_id = t.trace_id AND ss.name = 'session_started'
LEFT JOIN _tool_langfuse_observations tr
  ON tr.trace_id = t.trace_id AND tr.name = 'tool_result'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(tr.input, '$.operation')) = 'code_review'
LEFT JOIN _tool_langfuse_observations hs
  ON hs.trace_id = t.trace_id AND hs.name = 'handoff_submitted'
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
ORDER BY t.timestamp DESC

panels.description: Findings by severity across all code review sessions
panels.title: Findings by Severity

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.severity_counts.major') AS UNSIGNED)), 0) AS major,
  COALESCE(SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.severity_counts.minor') AS UNSIGNED)), 0) AS minor
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE name = 'tool_result'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(input, '$.operation')) = 'code_review'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)

panels.description: Files most frequently flagged across code reviews
panels.title: Most Reviewed Files

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(jt.file_path, '/', -2) AS file,
  COUNT(*) AS reviews
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations o
JOIN JSON_TABLE(
  o.input, '$.files_touched[*]' COLUMNS(file_path VARCHAR(500) PATH '$')
) AS jt
WHERE o.name = 'tool_result'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(o.input, '$.operation')) = 'code_review'
  AND $__timeFilter(o.start_time)
GROUP BY jt.file_path
ORDER BY reviews DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT
  name AS event_type,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE type = 'EVENT'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY name
ORDER BY count DESC

panels.description: Token usage per LLM call (input vs output)
panels.title: Token Usage per LLM Call

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  start_time AS time,
  input_tokens,
  output_tokens
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE type = 'GENERATION'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)
ORDER BY start_time

panels.description: Agent execution steps per session (spans breakdown)
panels.title: Agent Step Types

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  name,
  COUNT(*) AS executions
FROM _tool_langfuse_observations
WHERE type = 'SPAN'
  AND $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY name
ORDER BY executions DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.description: Average session duration and token cost
panels.title: Session Aggregates by User

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ss.input, '$.user_id')) AS user_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.trace_id) AS sessions,
  ROUND(AVG(t.latency_ms / 1000)) AS avg_duration_sec,
  SUM((
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total_tokens), 0)
    FROM _tool_langfuse_observations o
    WHERE o.trace_id = t.trace_id AND o.type = 'GENERATION'
  )) AS total_tokens,
  SUM(COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(tr.input, '$.findings_count') AS UNSIGNED), 0)) AS total_findings
FROM _tool_langfuse_traces t
LEFT JOIN _tool_langfuse_observations ss
  ON ss.trace_id = t.trace_id AND ss.name = 'session_started'
LEFT JOIN _tool_langfuse_observations tr
  ON tr.trace_id = t.trace_id AND tr.name = 'tool_result'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(tr.input, '$.operation')) = 'code_review'
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
GROUP BY JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ss.input, '$.user_id'))
ORDER BY sessions DESC

SELECT
  t.timestamp AS time,
  ROUND(t.latency_ms / 1000) AS duration_sec
FROM _tool_langfuse_traces t
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
ORDER BY t.timestamp
